# How to contribute to splunk-dns-answer-parser

## Join the community

- Click 'watch' on the GitHub repo

## Send your suggestions using one of these methods:

- as a [pull request](https://github.com/terminaloutcomes/splunk-dns-answer-parser/pulls)

- as [an issue](https://github.com/terminaloutcomes/splunk-dns-answer-parser/issues/new)

Thanks!
